description:
An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, powered by OpenCode

OpenWork is an extensible, open-source “Claude Work” style system for knowledge workers.
It’s a native desktop app that runs OpenCode under the hood, but presents it as a clean, guided workflow:
- pick a workspace
- start a run
- watch progress + plan updates
- approve permissions when needed
- reuse what works (templates + skills)
The goal: make “agentic work” feel like a product, not a terminal.
Highlights
- Sync desktop, server, orchestrator, and router package versions to 0.11.142 for the next stable release cut.
Fixes & polish
- Refresh lockfiles and release metadata so packaged artifacts resolve to the same version across surfaces.
Packaging / ops
- Publish the standard Release App workflow outputs for v0.11.142.
Compare:
https://github.com/different-ai/openwork/compare/v0.11.141...v0.11.142
